prompt: A moody vertical concert-stage illustration in a dark futuristic painterly anime style, showing a lone electronic musician or DJ performing on a small platform. The performer stands centered behind a folding table, wearing an oversized black hoodie, loose dark pants, and heavy dark shoes, with a glossy black robotic helmet featuring one bright circular blue lens in the middle of the face. One arm is raised dramatically upward toward a massive floating red square panel hanging above the stage, while the other arm rests near the table. The background is filled with thick red and black smoke clouds, creating a dramatic backlit atmosphere with deep crimson glow and heavy shadows. On the table are 5 visible gear elements: an open dark laptop in the center, a white boxy speaker or computer unit on the left, a pair of headphones on the right, a small audio device near the white unit, and a glowing red drink can at the far right edge. Around the stage are 6 additional visible elements: a microphone stand to the left of the performer, a keyboard or piano edge entering from the far left, 2 stacked equipment boxes or amps under and beside the table, a patterned oriental-style rug covering the platform floor, and multiple loose black cables snaking across the stage. Above everything, a huge suspended red square dominates the upper half of the image, slightly tilted in perspective, textured with darker vertical streaks and rough painterly variations. Cinematic low-angle composition, centered subject, dramatic negative space, intense red-and-black palette with one blue accent, soft smoky lighting, high contrast, live experimental music performance energy, mysterious cyberpunk atmosphere.
